DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, HEARINGS HELD RE: PLAINTIFFS LILIAN ACOSTA AND WENDY REYES' 1.) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FIRST SET OF INTERROGATORIES TO DEFENDANT KANU DUMBHALIA; 2.) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION TO DEFENDANT KANU DUMBHALIA; 3.) MOTION TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF ESI AND FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANTS; AND 4.) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FIRST SET OF FORM INTERROGATORIES-GENERAL SET 1, AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET 1 TO DEFENDANTS RAJAN INVESTMENTS, LLC, RAJAN INVESTMENTS 2, LLC AND COLISEUM MOTEL, LLC. THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER FURTHER TO ATTEMPT TO RESOLVE THE MATTERS. THE PARTIES ARE TO REPORT BACK VIA A JOINT STATEMENT TO BE EMAILED BY JULY 21, 2023 TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE AT JEFFWOHL@PAULHASTINGS.COM. THE JOINT STATEMENT SHOULD EITHER INFORM THE COURT THE MATTERS HAVE RESOLVED OR LIST WHAT THE OUSTANDING ISSUES ARE (AND MAY INCLUDE A BRIEF STATEMENT AS TO EACH SIDE'S POSITION ON THE ISSUES). UPON RECEIVING THE JOINT STATEMENT, THE COURT WILL ASSESS WHETHER A FURTHER COURT HEARING SHOULD BE SCHEDULED OR WHETHER THE COURT SHOULD ISSUE AN ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Esi And Further Responses To Plaintiffs? First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents To Defendants. Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARCO A. PALAU, Esq. of Advocates for Worker Rights LLP (Tel: 510-269-4200) for plaintiff;
Atty. WALTER J. LIN, Esq. of Law Office of Michael Heath (Tel: 415-931-4207) for defendants Kanu Dumbhalia, Rajan Investments, LLC, Rajan Investments 2, LLC, and Coliseum Motel, LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS LILIAN ACOSTA and WENDY REYES' Motion To Compel Production Of ESI And Further Responses To Plaintiffs' First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents To Defendants.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court instructs the parties to meet and confer further to attempt to resolve the matter. The parties are to report back via a joint statement to be emailed by July 21, 2023 to the pro tem judge at jeffwohl@paulhastings.com. The joint statement should either inform the Court the matter has resolved or list what the oustanding issues are (and may include a brief statement as to each side's position on the issues). Upon receiving the joint statement, the Court will assess whether a further court hearing should be scheduled or whether the Court should issue an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
